notes: Target repo exists and frontend/backend skeletons are in place.
Task packets for BE-001 and FE-001 now reference real repo paths.
FE-001 can begin in parallel with BE-001 because it is a shell-first UI slice.
Visit checklist domain and UI shell are implemented and verified locally.
Comparison/report now read backend data but still build presentation summaries client-side.
Binary attachment upload now works locally and stores files under artifacts/uploads.
CI and staging-readiness workflow skeletons exist, but real deploy wiring is still pending.
Frontend project/property/visit flows are wired to the backend API.
Local API smoke passed against a live uvicorn process.
Compose stack smoke passed, including S3-compatible attachment upload through MinIO.
Persistent DB integration now uses SQLAlchemy and Postgres in compose.
Auth and user ownership now scope project, property, and visit data.
Buyer/admin role-based authorization now applies consistently across owner-scoped resources.
Alembic initial migration is in place and local migration command succeeds.
Comparison and report now use dedicated backend payload contracts.
Staging deploy bundle and production approval workflow are prepared.
Visit drafts now autosave to browser storage and restore on reload.
Environment-specific deploy commands now have a validated contract for staging and production workflows.
Visit completion now keeps the saved visit and allows retrying only the attachment uploads that failed.
